Remove this banner only when the unit has been measured/hand-tuned. || UNIT: anis-sparkling-summer (Anis: Sparkling Summer) — SG / Supporter / Electric / Burst III; ammo 5 (LOW mag), reloadFrames 141, hitsPerShot 10 (pellets), normalMult 259.2, coreMult 200, burstCd 40s, baseCrit 15, baseCritDmg 150. KIT-PARSE AUTHOR pass 2026-07-16 (wave 3): merged staged baseline (overrides-baselines) + prior parser override. SG landing uses the engine-side class SG_LANDING_BY_BAND table (no per-unit landing factor here). MODEL — S1 (fullBurstEnter → alliesOfElement Electric, 10s): 'ATK ▲55.31% of the skill user's ATK' = casterAtkPct 55.31 (flat add of HER ATK, Supporter blast radius: every Electric teammate incl. self) + reloadSpeedPct 49.28 (weapon-state HARD RULE 1 / prior 9 — faster reload = more shots AND faster last-bullet proc cadence for every Electric ally). Trigger is literal 'when entering Full Burst' → fullBurstEnter (fires on every team FB regardless of who bursted — hard rule 6, correct as worded). S2 block A (lastBullet → enemy): flatDamage 382.42% — the named 'last bullet' archetype reference proc (HARD RULE 5), fires EVERY reload cycle; '2 enemy units with highest final ATK' = the single partless boss. FB by TIMING (prior 2 — no noFb; it's a normal-fire-keyed rider, lands whenever the mag empties); NO core (text says 'as damage', not 'core strike damage' — prior 2 text-fidelity); crit:true (prior 2 — function riders crit at caster rate; small: ~+7.5% on the proc at 15%/150%). S2 block B (lastBullet → self, 10s): partsDamagePct 6.91 kept as an INERT stat buff for kit fidelity (Interruption Parts don't exist on the partless boss → contributes 0; kept-not-dropped because it IS a stat/buff line — future consumer/parts-boss safe; audited-seen). BURST (burstCast → self, 10s): 'Affects self' in her OWN burst block → burstCast (hard rule 6 — fires ONLY on rotations SHE bursts; needs a real B1→B2→B3 chain, lone unit = zero FBs): maxAmmoPct -73.92 (HARD RULE 1 — ammo 5×0.2608≈1.3 → ~1-round mags for 10s; WHOLE-PICTURE: this is the kit's engine — every shot becomes the last bullet, so the 382.42% proc fires ~per shot for the window, at the cost of sustained pellet fire) + reloadSpeedPct 27.72 (stacks with her S1 49.28 on herself when FB is up: ~+77% reload speed ≈ 141f → ~80f ≈ 1.33s gaps between 1-round mags) + elemAdvantageDamagePct 42.24 (Damage-Up bucket, engine gates on real elemental advantage vs the boss — inert unless the boss is Electric-weak; prior 7: with this buff her advantaged total exceeds the clean ×1.10). NO lines dropped as defensive; no heal/shield/DEF/HP/gauge/hit-rate lines in kit; unmodeled arrays empty (all 7 lines block-modeled). ⚑ LIST (ALL unmeasured estimates): (1) CADENCE TUPLE ⚑ TOP — SG pullsPerSec + reloadFrames 141 + rolling-reload/reload_start_ammo are datamine-unreliable and NOT text-derivable; BOTH her out-of-burst last-bullet cadence (mags per fight) and the burst-window proc count hinge on it. Estimate = engine SG class default rate + datamined reloadFrames 141 (no cadence override shipped). Recipe: focused solo video — rounds/min, reload gap, per-magazine counter deltas. (2) BURST-WINDOW LAST-BULLET PROC COUNT ⚑ (heaviest lever) — with ~1-round mags + ~1.33s stacked-reload gaps, procs/window ≈ shots/window ≈ 10s ÷ (shot period + reload gap) ≈ 5-7 procs of 382.42%. Estimate = engine-derived from the cadence tuple; verify the mag actually floors to 1 (round(1.304) could be 1; if the engine ceils to 2 the proc rate halves). Recipe: slow-mo one focused burst window — count shots, reloads, and 382.42% popups. (3) crit:true on the 382.42% rider (prior 2 default) — verify popup colour (orange = crit) on the proc. (4) elemAdvantageDamagePct 42.24 pays out ONLY under real Electric advantage — confirm the graded boss element before reading her board number. (5) SG pellet split/landing — 10 pellets/shot through the class SG_LANDING_BY_BAND table (shipped default, per-unit landing is a measured-only refinement — do NOT pre-invent a factor). Recipe: focused solo per-magazine counter deltas → landing fraction vs the noir/guilty anchors. REVIEW GATE: genuinely-unmodeled unit — no automated grade case; validate-overrides + self-sim + DBG block-fires (driver runs at promotion; parallel batch = inspection only).
